provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male communications officer in his 30s with glasses and a pale complexion from living under artificial light, wearing a steel-blue uniform shirt with the top button undone and sleeves rolled to the elbows, a headset with a boom mic permanently around his neck even when off duty, data tablet in a hip holster, comfortable shoes not boots, the shirt has a coffee stain on the front that he has given up trying to remove
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Comms officer in steel-blue shirt, glasses, ship comms room with screens and equipment. Support role reads clearly. Coffee stain adds character.
